subject: A vast snow-covered mountain fortress carved into a jagged icy peak, with stepped ramparts and a ridgeline path winding up the slope under a pale overcast sky
description: A colossal stone-and-ice citadel rises from a snow-clad mountain, its terraced walls and battlements blending into the natural rock. The peak is jagged and frosted, with drifts of snow piled along the ramparts. A narrow winding path or causeway descends along the ridgeline, scaled to suggest enormous height. The sky is washed in pale blue-grey tones with diffused light, giving the scene a cold, sublime, almost desolate atmosphere. No human or creature figures are clearly visible — the fortress itself is the subject. Foreground rocks are dark and ice-rimed; midground walls are weathered grey stone; background fades into mist and pale sky.
foreground: dark frost-rimed rock outcrops and snow drifts at the base of the mountain
background: pale overcast sky fading into icy mist behind the upper ramparts
emotion: cold, remote, monumental — sense of isolation and scale
